message:
test(wave-70): trait coverage for reactor/token, lab/explorer, web/extract

7 new tests covering Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash/Default/PartialEq/Eq derives
across SlabToken, ExplorationMode, ExplorerConfig, SaturationMetrics,
Request, Extensions, ExtractionError.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
